steps.title: Identify the creative relationship
steps.content: The example sentence states that Thomas's brushstrokes “were inspired by” the natural light in her garden. This word “inspired” is the key signal—it shows that nature directly shaped her artistic decisions.

steps.title: Apply the relationship to the choices
steps.content: ”Influenced” directly parallels “inspired” from the example and captures how nature actively shaped her work. “Restricted,” “announced,” and “distracted” either contradict the fascination or misrepresent the causal relationship between nature and her artistic choices. That matches choice D — D is correct.
